Our special correspondents spoke to several of them.

title: While southern Lebanon evacuates, northern Israel stays put
summary: France will be sending 60 tons of humanitarian aid to Lebanon, as entire towns in the south of the country are under evacuation after orders were issued by the Israeli army. But across the border in Israel the strategy is different and many choose to stay put. The government is determined to keep people in their homes after it spent billions housing hundreds of thousands of displaced following the October 7 attacks.

title: Central Beirut targeted by Israeli strikes for second time since war started
summary: An Israeli strike hit an apartment block in central Beirut on March 11, further widening Israeli attacks in the capital beyond the Hezbollah-controlled southern suburbs where ​heavy bombardment continued. title: "No sign of Iranian uprising" despite US-Israeli encouragement
summary: Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei is injured but "safe and sound", the son of the president said on March 11, offering the first official explanation for why the 56-year-old has not been seen since his appointment. title: Dubai airport and Saudi oil field among targets of Iranian drones

title: Not "unlikely" some Iranian football players pressured to return from Australia

title: Iran adoption a strategy of 'war of attrition on several fronts'
